title: DFW Area 3-Unit Pink's Window Cleaning - Priced Way Less Than New!
supportTraining: The franchisor offers and requires training at their training facility at a training cost of $1,500 per particpant.
description:
--> Huge Price Reduction - Absentee Owner Says Sell Immediately! Don't Miss This One! Seriously, You Will Kick Yourself If You Are Looking to Open a Franchise in the DFW Area and Don't Inquire On This One!

--> Rare opportunity to step into a franchise system that is backed by the high-profile investor Codie Sanchez and her Contrarian Thinking portfolio.

--> Absentee owner is selling a total of 6 territories - buy 1, 2, 3, or all 6. Great territories in one of the hottest markets in the US. Busy attorney doesn't have time to manage this business and wants it gone ASAP! His loss can be your gain. The business ideally needs an owner who can actively operate and manage the business on a day to day basis or hire and a GM and manage them.

Formerly Operating Business (Recently Closed)
--> 2 territories were originally opened and had $40k+ in recurring annual revenue.
--> 50+ 5-star Google reviews and 200+ Facebook followers in just the last year.
--> CRM target list for HOAs, Churches, Banks, Storage Units, Builders, Property Mgrs, Hotels, etc.
--> Pre-approved on multiple vendor lists
--> Membership in local chambers and an influential industry group
--> Local brand presence including social media and team outreach

Why Buy?
--> Home service brand with low overhead and high demand model
--> Skip the 6-12 month buildout -- Start earning almost day 1
--> Celebrity affiliation + marketing lift from a known investor / popular social media influencer
--> Ideal for owner-operators or multi-unit franchises
--> Great franchisor support, including coaching, networking with other home service brands, and weekly meetings with other franchisees to share best practices.

--> Request information, and we will send you an NDA and Buyer Info sheet that can easily be filled out and signed online in a couple of minutes. Once completed, we will give you a call and discuss this opportunity with interested parties and connect you directly with the seller.
* Image shown may be a stock image
